audit_scope: All HIGH severity bugs in backend money-critical services

BE-PAY-001.issue: Floating-point precision in refund full/partial detection
BE-PAY-001.impact: Reconciliation errors, merchants see incorrect refund status

BE-PAY-002.issue: Replay attack on webhook events when Redis unavailable
BE-PAY-002.fix_hint: Reject webhooks with 503 if Redis unavailable
BE-PAY-002.impact: CRITICAL: Duplicate wallet credits, payment fraud

BE-PAY-009.issue: Webhook handler doesn't verify payment with Razorpay
BE-PAY-009.fix_hint: Call Razorpay API to verify payment status before wallet credit
BE-PAY-009.impact: Fake webhooks could credit wallet without actual payment

BE-PAY-017.impact: Information disclosure: merchants view other merchants' settlements

BE-PAY-025.issue: Concurrent webhook and capture API could credit wallet twice
BE-PAY-025.fix_hint: Set walletCredited=true inside transaction before job enqueue
BE-PAY-025.impact: Wallet balance corruption: coins credited twice for single payment

BE-MER-002.issue: Missing Merchant ID Validation in Profile Update
BE-MER-002.fix_hint: Whitelist editable fields, exclude isVerified, subscription, accountLockedUntil
BE-MER-002.impact: CRITICAL: Merchants self-verify, bypass KYC, escalate privileges

BE-MER-003.fix_hint: Remove bankDetails from MERCHANT_PROFILE_EDITABLE_FIELDS or ensure proper encryption
BE-MER-003.impact: CRITICAL: PII leak - bank details in plaintext, GDPR/RBI violation
BE-MER-003.compliance: GDPR, RBI - fines up to 4% revenue

BE-MER-004.fix_hint: Separate route for step-data updates vs progress tracking (admin-only)
BE-MER-004.impact: Merchants bypass KYC steps, fraudulent accounts activate

BE-MER-010.issue: Onboarding Bank Details Update Missing Field Validation
BE-MER-010.fix_hint: Validate IFSC (11 alphanumeric), account number (8-18 digits), account holder name
BE-MER-010.impact: Invalid bank account data, failed payouts, compliance issues

BE-MER-012.issue: Missing Authentication Context in Team Routes
BE-MER-012.fix_hint: Require password hash or email confirmation to prove identity
BE-MER-012.impact: Account hijacking: attacker accepts invitation for another user

BE-MER-013.issue: Team Member Password Hash Not Validated on Invite Accept
BE-MER-013.fix_hint: Enforce password: 12+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char
BE-MER-013.impact: Weak passwords on team accounts, security risk

BE-MER-036.issue: No Rate Limiting on Bulk Import
BE-MER-036.fix_hint: Add rate limit: 1 request per 10 seconds per merchant
BE-MER-036.impact: Resource exhaustion, DoS via legitimate API, service degradation

BE-AUTH-005.fix_hint: Increment failure counter only after comparison fails in Lua script
BE-AUTH-005.impact: User locked out prematurely from double-click OTP verification

BE-AUTH-007.issue: Upsert Creates Multiple Users on Concurrent OTP Verify
BE-AUTH-007.fix_hint: Ensure unique index on phoneNumber, use matchedCount for new user detection
BE-AUTH-007.impact: Race condition: one user's auth session creation silently ignored

BE-AUTH-015.impact: Users with forgotten passwords have no recovery mechanism

BE-AUTH-016.fix_hint: Add TOTP support and SMS second factor
BE-AUTH-016.impact: Users cannot enable 2FA, single-factor auth only

BE-AUTH-023.issue: Merchant Token Validation Missing Role Check
BE-AUTH-023.fix_hint: Validate role claim present before secret selection
BE-AUTH-023.impact: Malformed tokens bypass role-based secret validation

BE-AUTH-033.issue: OTP Sent in Logs for Development
BE-AUTH-033.fix_hint: Remove logging of OTP; use secure development flow
BE-AUTH-033.impact: OTP exposure in logs if NODE_ENV misconfigured

BE-AUTH-034.fix_hint: Add scoped token validation: tokens specify authorized user IDs
BE-AUTH-034.impact: Internal service compromise leaks all user data

BE-FIN-001.issue: BNPL limit reservation reversal is non-atomic
BE-FIN-001.fix_hint: Wrap reversal in retry loop with exponential backoff
BE-FIN-001.impact: Failed reversal blocks user permanently from BNPL

BE-FIN-014.issue: No concurrency control for loan disbursement
BE-FIN-014.fix_hint: Add status check: only allow disbursement if status='approved', atomically transition to 'disbursed'
BE-FIN-014.impact: Concurrent disbursement requests could double-disburse loans

BE-GW-009.impact: Auth bypass if middleware chain misconfigured

BE-GW-011.issue: Nginx Rate Limiting burst=5 allows bypass
BE-GW-011.impact: 5 concurrent invalid auth attempts bypass rate limit

BE-GW-014.fix_hint: Change default 1 to explicitly check Bearer token
BE-GW-014.impact: Authenticated user data cached and served to next request

BE-GW-026.issue: Cache Key Includes Plain Authorization Header
BE-GW-026.impact: One user's cached response serves another user with slightly different token

BE-GW-028.impact: Rate limiting bypassed with arbitrary Authorization header values

BE-ORD-024.issue: Missing Cancellation TTL on Cancelling Status
BE-ORD-024.fix_hint: Implement scheduled job to auto-expire orders stuck in 'cancelling' for >1 hour
BE-ORD-024.impact: Orders hang in cancelling state indefinitely, inventory never released

rez-order-service.note: 11 of 12 HIGH bugs fixed in Phase 1

rez-wallet-service.note: No HIGH severity bugs. 20+ MEDIUM severity concurrency issues identified.

user_authentication.security_impact: User creation races, concurrent auth failures

api_security.security_impact: Rate limit bypass, cache poisoning, credential leak

phase1_completion_status.summary: Phase 1 (CRITICAL bugs) substantially completed with 12 of 13 order service HIGH bugs fixed. Phase 2 (HIGH severity) requires immediate attention for payment, merchant, and auth services.

implementation_requirements.deployment_strategy: Batch by service: payment -> merchant -> auth -> gateway
testing_checklist: Replay attack: Webhook duplicate + Redis down -> 503 rejection
Wallet double-credit: Concurrent capture + webhook -> single credit
Merchant self-verify: PUT { isVerified: true } -> 403 Forbidden
OTP race: 2 concurrent verify -> single lockout
User race: 2 concurrent OTP verify same phone -> single user
Bank encryption: GET /profile -> bankDetails not visible
implementation_requirements.load_testing: Minimum 100 concurrent requests on auth/payment paths
